title: Chore: Improve .gitignore for cleaner repository
original_text: Improved the .gitignore file to exclude more unnecessary files from version control. Added patterns for IDE files (.vscode/, .idea/), OS files (.DS_Store, Thumbs.db), build artifacts (dist/, build/), and temporary files (*.tmp, *.swp). Also added patterns for Python bytecode, node_modules, and log files. This keeps the repository cleaner and reduces noise in git status. Result: git status shows only tracked files.
expected_body_lines: - Exclude build artifacts and temporary files
- Add Python, Node, and log file patterns
- Validation: git status shows only tracked files
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(repo): improve .gitignore for cleaner repository"
